lint.details: No lint configured for workspace yet

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document field naming convention: NarrativeBranch and similar nested domain types use snake_case (public_benefit, polarization_risk, compression_loss), while top-level TypeScript interface fields (RadarSnapshot.scoreRanges, RadarSnapshot.disagreementIndex) use camelCase. New schema fields should follow this pattern unless a full migration is done.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-signal-pipeline-cleanup standardized NarrativeBranch to snake_case but left RadarSnapshot top-level in camelCase. Mixed convention in packages/radar-core/src/snapshot-reducer.ts may confuse future workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that LANE_TAGS utility (threat-radar-web/src/ui/utils/lane-tags.ts) was created but components still use inline lane-tag definitions. A future cleanup should wire components to use the shared utility.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-signal-pipeline-cleanup extracted LANE_TAGS to src/ui/utils/lane-tags.ts but EtaThreadCard, MuThreadCard, and PiLaneConnections still define lane tags inline. grep for LANE_TAGS import in src/ui/components/ returns no matches.
